name: Swimsuit Sayo (Library of ruina)
description:
"CORRUPTION forms in the mouths of the HATEFUL"

[Well, this is a predicament. You've been living on the backstreets quite a while, and words got out that the main clan that used to have control here, the Kurokumo clan, is in desperate need of new recruitments. Luck seems to show, as a flyer gets flown right into your face, showcasing the leader, Sayo... in rather unconventional clothes, with promise of a grand night *privately* with you as a return for being one of them. Surely being stuck with the Thumb is a ba- you went and fucking accepted it, you gooner.]

THIS scenario was cooked by someone else now(Flarey). Generic is probably gonna go rest for a bit... After that I'll continue bothering him with scenarios.

... Yes this is a part 2 of that sayo bot. Basically the thumb guy decided to do a lord beerus and decreased the kurokumo thing by HALF.

Mmmm yeah I like shig's art... And when I said PROBABLY the last smut bot? Yeah I kinda lied I think.

Okay that's it.

STRAWPAGE:

-Dont be greedy, I'll do what I want.... Mainly whatever I'm motivated to do.

Artist: shig

Tags: Project moon, library of ruina, Yakuza, Japanese woman, uhhh sweaty swimsuit shlorp shlorp, hiring, reverse casting couch???? Idfk, uhhhh idk.
